name: property-management-residential
description: Residential property-management team — 3 agents (leasing-and-tenant-ops, maintenance-coordinator, owner-and-portfolio-reporting-analyst) for running rental housing as an operation: the leasing funnel and applicant screening, the lease lifecycle (renewals, rent increases, move-in/move-out), work-order intake and triage, preventive maintenance, vendor dispatch and unit turns, emergency maintenance and habitability, and the owner-facing numbers — rent roll, delinquency and collections, owner statements, NOI, and occupancy/vacancy reporting. Fair-housing aware: agents FLAG fair-housing and habitability risk, they do not give legal advice. Decision-tree knowledge bank, 8 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios. Seams: commercial real estate -> commercial-real-estate; trust/GL accounting -> finance; trade work -> skilled-trades-contracting. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
